case_title: WINSTON, JUDITH VS BROWN, MARIE LYNN AKA BROWN MIMI

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ON CASE 468411 FILED BY PLAINTIFF WINSTON, JUDITH AS TO DEFENDANT BROWN, MARIE LYNN AKA BROWN MIMI
